recommendations.title: Kings
recommendations.overview: A foster family in South Central a few weeks before the city erupts in violence following the verdict of the Rodney King trial in 1992.

recommendations.title: The Witcher: Nightmare of the Wolf
recommendations.overview: Escaping from poverty to become a witcher, Vesemir slays monsters for coin and glory, but when a new menace rises, he must face the demons of his past.

recommendations.title: The Young and the Damned
recommendations.overview: A group of juvenile delinquents live a violent life in the infamous slums of Mexico City; among them Pedro, whose morality is gradually corrupted and destroyed by the others.

recommendations.title: The Ten Commandments: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Follows Moses leading and conducting the Hebrew people from the slavery of Egypt to the freedom towards the Promised Land according to the Ancient Testament Bible book of the Exodus. The story told like never before is faithful to the Scriptures.

recommendations.title: Paradise Alley
recommendations.overview: Three Italian-American brothers, living in the slums of 1940's New York City, try to help each other with one's wrestling career using one brother's promotional skills and another brother's con-artist tactics to thwart a sleazy manager.

recommendations.title: Queen of Katwe
recommendations.overview: A young girl overcomes her disadvantaged upbringing in the slums of Uganda to become a Chess master.

recommendations.title: The Lost Husband
recommendations.overview: Trying to put her life back together after the death of her husband, Libby and her children move to her estranged Aunt's goat farm in central Texas.

recommendations.title: City of God
recommendations.overview: In the poverty-stricken favelas of Rio de Janeiro in the 1970s, two young men choose different paths. Rocket is a budding photographer who documents the increasing drug-related violence of his neighborhood, while José “Zé” Pequeno is an ambitious dru

recommendations.title: The Mosquito Coast
recommendations.overview: An inventor spurns his city life and moves his family into the jungles of Central America to make a utopia.

recommendations.title: Fences
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Pittsburgh, a frustrated African-American father struggles with the constraints of poverty, racism, and his own inner demons as he tries to raise a family.
